hooks.command: input=$(cat); if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -x .claude/hooks/pre-commit-check.sh ] && echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'git commit'; then .claude/hooks/pre-commit-check.sh; fi

if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then file=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && [ "$file" != "null" ] && [[ "$file" == *.ts || "$file" == *.tsx || "$file" == *.js || "$file" == *.jsx ]]; then npx prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi

if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then file=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && [ "$file" != "null" ] && [[ "$file" == *.py ]]; then uvx ruff check --fix --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null || true; uvx ruff format --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi

if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then file=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && [ "$file" != "null" ] && [[ "$file" == *.ts || "$file" == *.tsx ]]; then cd services/frontend/app && npx eslint --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi

if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then file=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && [ "$file" != "null" ] && [[ "$file" == *.ts || "$file" == *.tsx ]] && [[ "$file" == *services/frontend/* ]]; then cd services/frontend/app && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true; fi; fi
